Reasoning
Q1
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions given below.
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B
> Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Step I: The numbers which are immediately
preceded by symbol and immediately followed
by an alphabet are arranged in the end of the
series in increasing order (arranged immediate
after U).
Step 
II: 
The 
odd 
numbers
which 
are
immediately preceded by an alphabet then
interchanges their positions.
Step III: The alphabets which are immediately
followed 
by
a 
symbol 
are
arranged 
in
alphabetical order between F and 6 of step II.
Note: Step II is applied after step I and step III is
applied after step II.
In step III, if all numbers at odd position are
added by 2 and all numbers at even position
are added by 3. Then what is the sum of
numbers in step III?
(A) 42
(B) 58
(C) 64
(D) 46
(E) 48

? N 3 6 Q = 9 L S R 5 D $ 8 A + 7 C T ~ G 2 X Y

Alphabet are written in ascending order at the
right end.
Step 2: After finishing step 1st, interchange the
odd number with the previous element of the
series to form step 2nd.
Step 3: After completing step 2, the alphabets
that are immediately followed by a symbol will
be written between the sixth and seventh

elements from the right end, in alphabetical
order from left to right.

from the left end?
(A) ?
(B) C
(C) +
(D) ~
(E) G

Q11
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
M D O X W H C R F B E S O S D G F I E O G W Q
T A G C W U F
STEP I: All the vowels are changed to the next
letter as per English alphabetical series.
STEP II: All the consonants are changed to the
next letter as per English alphabetical series.
STEP III: All the vowels are rearranged in
alphabetical order at the right end of the series.
Note: step I will apply first and then step II will
be applied and lastly step III will be applied to
the given series.
 
Which of the following letters will be 14th from
the right end after step III?
(A) Q
(B) K
(C) H
(D) X
(E) None of these

Q16
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
@ S 9 8 N % 6 T C X 8 B & 14 R + 13 K L # G 7 R D
Step 1 – Those Numbers which is immediately
preceded by the symbol and immediately
followed by an Alphabet are written from the
right end in ascending order from right to left.
Step 2 – After completing the step -1,
interchanging the Odd number with the
previous element in the series to form the step
-2
Step 3 – After completing the step – 2,
Alphabet which is immediately preceded by a
symbol are written between SEVENTH and
EIGHTH element from the Right end in reverse
alphabetical order from left to right.
Step 4 – After completing the step – 3, The first
eleven element from the left end is written after
the last element in series in the reverse order(It
means eleven element from the left end is

written immediately after the last element and
so on..,)
 
How many numbers are immediately followed
and immediately preceded by an alphabet in
step-4?
(A) six
(B) none
(C) Three
(D) five
(E) None of these

every two alphabets in ascending order from

one by one after every four elements from the
right end, then vowels are placed one by one
between 
each 
symbol 
and 
number 
in

the right end in the final step?

(D) Five
(E) Three

Hints & Solutions
Q1
Text Solution:
Given series:
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B >
Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Step I:
The numbers which are immediately preceded
by symbol and immediately followed by an
alphabet are arranged in the end of the series
in increasing order (arranged immediate after
U).
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B >
Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Series after step I:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Step II:
The odd numbers which are immediately
preceded by an alphabet then interchanges
their positions.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Series after step II:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Step III:
The alphabets which are immediately followed
by a symbol are arranged in alphabetical order
between F and 6 of step II.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Series after step III:
% D @ H 4 W & F B C G L N S X Y 6 3 © K T 5 Q #
> £ ¥ ∞ € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Numbers at odd position in step III are: 4, 6, 7, 8
Adding “2” to the above numbers: 6, 8, 9, 10
Numbers at even position in step III are: 3, 5, 2, 9
Adding “3” to the above numbers: 6, 8, 5, 12
Sum: 6 + 8 + 9 + 10 + 6 + 8 + 5 + 12 = 64
Hence, the required sum is 64.
Q2
Text Solution:
Given series:
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B >
Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Step I:
The numbers which are immediately preceded
by symbol and immediately followed by an
alphabet are arranged in the end of the series
in increasing order (arranged immediate after
U).
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B >
Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Series after step I:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Step II:
The odd numbers which are immediately
preceded by an alphabet then interchanges
their positions.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Step III:
The alphabets which are immediately followed
by a symbol are arranged in alphabetical order
between F and 6 of step II.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Series after step III:
% D @ H 4 W & F B C G L N S X Y 6 3 © K T 5 Q #
> £ ¥ ∞ € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Third element from right end in step II is 7.
Seventeenth element from left end in step III is
6.
Product: 7 × 6 = 42

Hence, the product is 42.

¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Step II:
The odd numbers which are immediately
preceded by an alphabet then interchanges
their positions.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Series after step II:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £

Step III:

by a symbol are arranged in alphabetical order
between F and 6 of step II.

¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Series after step III:
% D @ H 4 W & F B C G L N S X Y 6 3 © K T 5 Q #
> £ ¥ ∞ € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
 
Required combination: alphabet – symbol
% D @ H 4 W & F B C G L N S X Y 6 3 © K T 5 Q #
> £ ¥ ∞ € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Hence, there is three such combination.

Text Solution:
Given series:
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B >
Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Step I:
The numbers which are immediately preceded
by symbol and immediately followed by an
alphabet are arranged in the end of the series
in increasing order (arranged immediate after
U).
% 7 D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © 9 K T Q 5 C # 8 B >
Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Series after step I:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Step II:
The odd numbers which are immediately
preceded by an alphabet then interchanges
their positions.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Series after step II:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Step III:
The alphabets which are immediately followed
by a symbol are arranged in alphabetical order
between F and 6 of step II.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Series after step III:
% D @ H 4 W & F B C G L N S X Y 6 3 © K T 5 Q #
> £ ¥ ∞ € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
Required combination in step II: number –
alphabet – number
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 7 U 8 9
 
Hence, there is only one such alphabet.

Y £ ¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U
Series after step I:
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9
Step II:
The odd numbers which are immediately
preceded by an alphabet then interchanges
their positions.
% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T Q 5 C # B > Y £
¥ G ∞ X € Z R 2 U 7 8 9

% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £

Step III:

by a symbol are arranged in alphabetical order

% D S @ H 4 W L & F 6 3 N © K T 5 Q C # B > Y £

Sixth from right end in step I is R.
Fifth from left end in step III is 4.
Hence, “none of these” is correct answer.
Q6
Text Solution:
Given series:-
? N 3 6 Q = 9 L S R 5 D $ 8 A + 7 C T ~ G 2 X Y
Step 1: Numbers that are immediately preceded
by a symbol and immediately followed by an
Alphabet are written in ascending order at the
right end.
Step 1: ? N 3 6 Q = L S R 5 D $ A + C T ~ G 2 X Y 7
8 9
Step 2: After finishing step 1st, interchange the
odd number with the previous element of the
series to form step 2nd.
Step 2: ? 3 N 6 Q = L S 5 R D $ A + C T ~ G 2 X 7 Y
9 8
Step 3: After completing step 2, the alphabets
that are immediately followed by a symbol will
be written between the sixth and seventh
elements from the right end, in alphabetical
order from left to right.
Step 3: ? 3 N 6 = L S 5 R $ + C ~ G A D Q T 2 X 7 Y
9 8
Final series: ? 3 N 6 = L S 5 R $ + C ~ G A D Q T 2
X 7 Y 9 8
According to the common solution,
The ninth to the right of the element that is
eighth from the left end in step 2. = 8 + 9 = 17th
from the left end is “~”.
Hence, the correct answer is option D.

Q21
Text Solution:
Z Y % A 1 8 X W # E 3 6 V T + I 5 4 S R * O 7 2 Q P
? U 9

Common Solution:
Step 1: Take the Last ten consonants and
arrange them in reverse alphabetical order Z Y
X W V T S R Q P
Step 2: After completing Step 1, The odd
numbers below 10 are placed after every two
alphabets in ascending order from the left end.
Z Y 1 X W 3 V T 5 S R 7 Q P 9
Step 3: After completing Step 2, the symbols “ %
# + * ?” are placed preceded by each number
in the same order from the left end. Z Y % 1 X W
# 3 V T + 5 S R * 7 Q P ? 9
Step 4: After completing Step3, single-digit
even numbers (in ascending order) are placed
after every four elements from the right end,
then vowels are placed between symbol and
number in alphabetical order from the left end.
Z Y % A 1 8 X W # E 3 6 V T + I 5 4 S R * O 7 2 Q P
? U 9
